example: Crime rates have increased in the city.
The bank was the target of a robbery last night.
She was a victim of mugging on her way home.
The school suffered from vandalism over the weekend.
Burglary is the act of breaking into a house to steal.
Pickpocketing is common in crowded tourist areas.
Shoplifting is stealing goods from a store.
The police investigated the murder case thoroughly.
Kidnapping is a serious crime involving taking someone hostage.
The kidnappers demanded a ransom for the victim's release.
The plane was hijacked by terrorists.
He was a victim of blackmail and kept it secret.
